column1: Next Steps: what is the experience of students from a care background in education?
Group variables: Year, Care category, A level points
Statistics: Applicants, Placed applicants, Proportion of applicants, Proportion of placed applicants
Coverage: UK 18 year olds with at least 3 A levels, who applied by 28 days after JCQ results day
Counts are rounded to the nearest 10, percentages are rounded to 1 decimal place. Percentages where either contributing group is less than 20 are suppressed.
